final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a warm Chinese family hotpot dinner gathering.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary photography, contemporary Chinese lifestyle editorial
Composition: eye-level medium shot capturing the round table and family members, natural framing with slight depth
Subject: multi-generational Chinese family gathered around a round table, raising glasses in a toast, genuine laughter and connection, hands holding cups mid-air
Scene/backdrop: cozy dining room with a round Chinese table at center, bubbling hotpot with visible steam rising, walls covered with framed family photos creating a personal gallery
Lighting/mood: warm yellow ambient lighting from overhead fixtures and wall sconces, soft glow creating intimate atmosphere, steam catching the light
Color palette: warm amber and yellow as dominant tones, rich browns of wooden furniture, red accents from hotpot and decorations, cream and beige from steam and walls
Materials/textures: glossy ceramic hotpot surface with bubbling broth, steam wisps, wooden table grain, matte photo frames on wall, fabric of casual home clothing
Avoid: harsh white lighting, sterile restaurant environment, posed artificial smiles, 8K stuffer aesthetic, oversaturated colors
